summary: Backend testing complete for Notification Center. All 15 tests PASSED. Fixed critical bug in send_notification_to_user function - notifications were only stored when users had push tokens registered.
critical_code_review_comments: Message notifications properly trigger for recipients
Social post like/comment notifications work for inter-user actions
Self-like and self-comment correctly do NOT create notifications
Notification history returns proper structure with type filtering support
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed send_notification_to_user to store notifications BEFORE checking push tokens

SECOND_USER.note: Made VIP during testing for social features

seed_data_creation: Test posts, likes, comments created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification center fully tested. All endpoints functional. Bug was fixed where notifications only stored when push tokens existed.

api_endpoints_tested.result: Returns notification history with id, title, body, type, data, is_read, created_at
Marks specific or all notifications as read (empty array = mark all)
Registers Expo push token. Returns 400 for invalid token format
Sends message and creates 'new_message' notification for recipient
Likes post and creates 'post_like' notification for post author (if not self-like)
Adds comment and creates 'post_comment' notification for post author (if not self-comment)

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Notifications were only stored in database if user had active push tokens. Users without push tokens registered never received in-app notifications.
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Moved notification storage BEFORE push token check. Notifications are now always stored regardless of push token status.
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.impact: HIGH - Users could receive messages/likes/comments but never see them in notification history

notification_types_supported: new_message - Triggered when user receives a message
post_like - Triggered when another VIP user likes their social post
post_comment - Triggered when another VIP user comments on their social post
story_reaction - Triggered when another user reacts to their VIP story
price_alert - Triggered when a price alert condition is met
mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKED APIs - Expo Push Service is REAL via https://exp.host/--/api/v2/push/send
